role: Integration and end-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI tool.
responsibility: Validates the ArchSpine CLI binary across a wide range of scenarios, including initialization, pipeline execution, configuration, violation detection, removal, and read-only operations, by spawning child processes in isolated temporary directories with mocked inputs and asserting correct exit codes, output, and side effects.

children.role: Integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI tool, validating end-to-end execution via child processes.

E2E test suite for the 'archspine init' command, validating advanced initialization scenarios including temporary project creation, git repository initialization, mocked interactive prompts, and configuration generation.
Vitest E2E integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline.
E2E test suite for the ArchSpine CLI, validating the built CLI binary against real filesystem operations and child processes.
End-to-end (E2E) integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI.
Vitest integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI violation detection system.
Vitest end-to-end test suite for validating the CLI binary behavior across various arguments and project states.
